title: hydrocotyle kollimalayensis
intro: Hydrocotyle kollimalayensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrocotylaceae, is commonly known as the Indian pennywort. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to regulate blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle kollimalayensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often consumed as a tea, or used as a supplement in capsule or tablet form, and can also be applied topically to the skin in the form of a cream or oil.
